### Universal Healthcare
In clinics and online forums alike, there's a whisper of hope and a shout of frustration. The vision of a system where every step, whether virtual or in-person, leads directly to accessible care is why I believe in Universal Healthcare. Every visit, not just visits to those who can afford it, needs to matter. Building a future where no single diagnosis marks the end—only the start of actual, equal support. 💷🌍#EveryStepcounts
